approach: fail-closed parse guard on the three spec-gate mechanical checks; guard only, not the unparseable suite content (nodes op6-m4/op6-m5)
check-suite consults the pinned Gherkin parser instead of its own lenient regex parser; a parse failure is a violation, not silence
classify-edit-class reads the gherkin-cli per-file EPARSE error field and escalates rather than returning no-content-change
regression test per check proving an unparseable .feature fails it closed

why.floor: none — additive scenarios on a frozen suite, self-clears; no narrowing, no re-open
why.blast: medium — internal gate tooling; failing closed only bites a CR that touches an unparseable suite
why.novelty: low — applies the settled escalate-not-exempt principle the gate already enforces elsewhere
why.confidence: high — all three fail-opens reproduced directly against a real unparseable suite before any edit

why: Clearance ratified for a reformat of three frozen suites (mechanic, recruitment, spec-anchors). Cause was authoring formatting, never corruption: seven steps soft-wrapped across two physical lines (Gherkin has no step continuation) and one Feature-description line beginning with an @-token (parsed as a tag). Repair joins the wrapped steps and reflows the description; whitespace-normalized text is word-for-word identical to the committed baseline, verified mechanically. Ratified live in-session as semantics-preserving. The edit is unclassifiable by the structural differ (the baseline does not parse), which is exactly the escalation this CR's guard introduces.

Fail-closed parse guard for the spec-gate mechanical checks (node op6-m1). 14 added / 0 modified / 0 removed, verified by the structural differ — additive, self-clears, stays frozen, no re-open and no Clearance. Cold spec-judge round 2 ALIGNED true on an independently re-derived oracle across all three lenses. Round 1 failed the builder lens: every scenario asserted the guard fails closed, so a constant fail-closed implementation would have satisfied the whole suite — the safety dual of the fail-open defect under repair. Closed additively with two discriminating scenarios; round 2 confirmed no direction is now satisfiable by a constant, and that the rename and unfrozen-skip boundary scenarios keep unclassifiable from being constant either. Mechanical: check-suite OK, check-spec-state OK, concept-index no drift, no overlap, no structural findings, no plan leaks. Blast medium and bounded to internal gate tooling; floor none; leash auto-spec. Self-asserted — ratify or kick back.

note: The corpus drift detector consumes the edit-class classifier and branches only on narrowing and mixed; every other classification, now including the unclassifiable this CR introduces, falls through to reporting no drift. A frozen suite the differ cannot classify therefore reads as clean there — the same fail-open class this CR closes at the spec gate, one capability removed. Pre-existing rather than introduced: before this CR the same input classified as no-content-change and fell through the identical branch. Classified backlog, not blocking: the drift detector is a separate capability with its own frozen contract, and this mission's completion claim is scoped to the spec gate. Discovered by the impl-judge's orthogonal read, not by any frozen scenario.

why: Cold impl-judge round 2 APPROVE — 14/14 frozen scenarios verified on an independently re-derived oracle. Round 1 returned CHANGE on evidence, not opinion: three scenarios rested on no verification, shown by ablating the implementation rather than by reading it. Reverting the tree-wide sweep to its pre-fix code left the whole suite green; rewriting the differ's failure branch to a reassuring class left it green. Both reproduced independently before being accepted. Round 2 re-ran five mutations and all five now go red, and it verified by construction that the sweep's fixture is unparseable to the pinned parser while flawless to the permissive scan, so only the parse verdict can fail it. The conductor self-caught that its first sweep test was itself unloseable (fixture also hedged, so it failed on the hedge with the guard reverted) and replaced the fixture. pnpm verify green, 21/21 tasks. Blast medium, bounded to internal gate tooling; floor none; leash auto-spec. Self-asserted — ratify or kick back.
